mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipes ( user_id, recipe_name, description, ingredients_json, steps_json, source_items_json, favorite, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{recipeName}, #{description}, #{ingredientsJson}, #{stepsJson}, #{sourceItemsJson}, #{favorite}, #{status}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM recipes WHERE recipes.user_id = #{userId} AND id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM recipes)

SELECT id, user_id, recipe_name AS recipeName, description, ingredients_json AS ingredientsJson, steps_json AS stepsjson, created_at AS createdAt FROM recipes WHERE recipes.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 30
